sourceTitle: Generative AI in Teaching and Learning: Policies | Faculty Instructional Support and Development
evidenceSnippetOriginal: The use of generative AI tools to create responses to course assignments in a way that is unacceptable to the course instructor may be considered a case of academic dishonesty by the university.
